content.fact_text: A production-ready environment configuration loader that parses, validates, and freezes application settings using zod and dotenv.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes environment variables on startup, validates them against a rigid Zod schema, terminates the process on failure, and exports an immutable, type-safe configuration object.
provenance_data.utility: Provides a centralized, type-safe, and immutable configuration object for the entire application, ensuring fail-fast behavior on invalid environment variables.
